mapper.sql: id, sys_no, soli_project_id, expert_list, ethic_expert_list, proj_type,type,allot_count
mapper.select: select expert_list from srm_project_solicit_audit where sys_no=#{sysNo} and soli_project_id=#{rowId}
select ethic_expert_list from srm_project_solicit_audit where sys_no=#{sysNo} and soli_project_id=#{rowId}
select csu.id as rowId,csu.account as account,csu.name as name from ct_srm_user csu where is_expert=1
select csu.id as rowId,csu.account as account,csu.name as name from ct_srm_user csu where is_ethical_expert=1
mapper.update: update srm_project_solicit_audit set is_cancel=1 where sys_no=#{sysNo} and soli_project_id=#{ywRowId}
